expectations.text: Reads /.ai-context and module-context.md before writing any code
expectations.evidence: ## Context read-out (before any code) — **NIVEL 2 — `module-context.md`** tells me: `FermentationNoteRepository` is ✅ COMPLETE (19 unit + 20 integration tests).

expectations.text: Writes test first (TDD) before implementing the entity
expectations.evidence: ## Step 1 — Write the failing service tests first (TDD: Red) ... ## Step 2 — Implement `FermentationNoteService` (Green)

expectations.text: Entity extends BaseEntity and includes winery_id
expectations.evidence: Entity columns listed as: `note_text` (Text), `action_taken` (String 255), `created_by_user_id`, `fermentation_id`, `is_deleted`. BaseEntity is confirmed, but `winery_id` is not a column on the entity — only used as a query-scoping parameter in service/repo calls.

## Step 7 — No new Alembic migration needed. The `fermentation_notes` table was already created during the repository phase... Run `alembic current` to confirm. Migration creation is only mentioned as a fallback ('If for some reason the table doesn't exist').

expectations.text: Tells user to update module-context.md test count and component list
expectations.evidence: ## Step 8 — Update `.ai-context/module-context.md` — Update the Component Summary table and Completed Components... Also add `FermentationNoteService` to the Service Component bullet list and `fermentation_note_router.py` to the API Layer bullet list.
